title: Linear multiplication count of naive exponentiation
statement_informal: Naive exponentiation b^e by repeated multiplication uses exactly e multiplications (contrast the logarithmic fast-exponentiation).

cost_model.notes: One multiply per exponent step: snd (powc b e) = e. The Rocq target also proves value = b^e. Pairs with fast-exponentiation-mults (2*bits) to show the cost gap.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 2, evaluation of powers (fact only).
